message:
chore(beads): Sync issue tracker state with ongoing project work

Update beads issue tracker state (.beads/issues.jsonl) to reflect
current project status. This sync includes:

- Issue updates across multiple feature development streams
- Status transitions for ongoing work (dashboard, context rotation,
  file reservation conflict detection, workflow templates)
- Metadata updates and description refinements
- Net addition of 34 tracked issues (1066 -> 1100 total)

The beads state is committed alongside code changes per project
workflow guidelines to maintain issue tracker consistency and
enable accurate dependency tracking via bv.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
